welcome.body: SEKAR needs a bit of setup so you can get straight to the field. Just a moment, only once.

permissions.title: Give access to your phone
permissions.subtitle: All permissions below are required for tracking and reporting to work fully.

clockable.title: Your work area
clockable.body: Your work area has been set. Tap Start Working to open the dashboard.

kecamatan.title: Ready to submit requests?
kecamatan.body: Open your rayon request list and submit new requests whenever needed.

admin.title: Ready to start?
admin.body: Dashboard shows team summary and pending requests.
